headline: A Look At Universal Health Services (UHS) Valuation As First Quarter 2026 Earnings And Safety Issues Draw Focus
summary: Universal Health Services (UHS) is back in focus as it prepares to release first quarter 2026 results on April 27, with investors watching earnings guidance, growth projects, and ongoing Cedar Hill safety and staffing issues. See our latest analysis for Universal Health Services. At a share price of $180.61, UHS has seen a 17.86% year to date share price decline and a 13.33% 90 day share price return. However, its 3 year total shareholder return of 38.14% suggests longer term momentum has...
